title: Designer Paper Napkins, 3-Ply 16.5x16.5 cm Disposable Decorative Guest Lunch Napkins for Birthday, Party, Baby Shower (20-Count, Jelly Garden Blue)
features: **Premium Quality:** Crafted with superior materials, JoyfulArtink's decorative paper napkins offer exceptional durability and a luxurious feel, ensuring a high-quality experience for you and your guests.
**Charming Design:** Featuring a lovely, dreamy watercolor whale in shades of blue and pink, these napkins bring an artistic touch to your table, sparking imagination and a playful atmosphere.
**Generous Size and Layers:** Each 33x33 cm disposable napkin provides ample coverage with three layers of premium paper for excellent absorbency and strength, making cleanup effortless and efficient

**Pack of 20 Lunch and Dinner Napkins:** Perfect for hosting intimate gatherings, exclusive events, wedding shower parties, or daily use. These napkins blend practicality with elegance for any occasion

**Versatile and Practical:** Ideal for special events, parties, picnics, BBQs, and everyday use. JoyfulArtink's napkins serve as functional essentials and charming decorative accents, enhancing any dining experience
description: Product Description Unleashing Everyday Creativity Add a burst of natural beauty to your table with JoyfulArtink’s Fresh Bouquet Floral White napkins. Featuring a vibrant wildflower pattern on a crisp white background, this design brings the charm of a blooming meadow to any occasion.
